description: Synthetically generated student queries and reference advisory responses created by the research team for training bias-detection rules and evaluating the advising pipeline. All data is fabricated - no real student statements are used. Synthetic origin is flagged explicitly in every record's metadata.

authors: Research team - D.R.O.N.A. project, Softwarica College

schema.text: string - the synthetic student query text

metadata.bias_type: string or null - the target bias label, e.g. 'anchoring'
metadata.expected_flags: list[string] - bias_type values the detector should produce
metadata.is_clean: boolean - true when the query contains no bias (negative examples)

pii.notes: All text is fabricated; any resemblance to real persons is coincidental

labelling.notes: Each record specifies the intended bias type; used as ground truth for C2 evaluation

known_limitations: English-only; does not capture Nepali-medium student phrasing
Bias archetypes are idealised; real students exhibit mixed or subtle bias signals
Small corpus relative to production diversity
bias_notes: Synthetic data over-represents textbook bias archetypes
Must never be mixed with real student data without explicit label separation
